roles.title: Research Assistant
roles.description: Conducting research on LLMs, network science, and their applications to supply-chain analysis, with a focus on connecting methodological research to real-world economic and industrial systems.

roles.title: Lead of Data Analytics Unit
roles.description: Leading analytics initiatives for marketing and business decision making, with a focus on data-driven strategy, team development, and analytical solution design.

roles.title: Data Analyst
roles.description: Worked on the planning and implementation of analytical solutions using statistical modeling, machine learning, and causal inference for marketing applications.

roles.title: Researcher
roles.description: Conducted research on consumer behavior and market trends using survey data and statistical analysis to provide insights for marketing strategies and product development.

roles.title: Data Scientist (Internship)
roles.description: Worked on applied data science projects related to interview and communication data, supporting the development of practical analytical approaches in real business settings.
